_permissions_warning: REVIEW CAREFULLY: Bash/Write/Edit let Claude act without asking. Remove any you're not comfortable with.

PreToolUse.description: CAST enforcement — blocks raw git commit/push, redirects to agents

UserPromptSubmit.description: CAST routing — matches prompts and injects [CAST-DISPATCH] directives

PostToolUse.description: CAST review — auto-formats code, injects [CAST-REVIEW] directive, logs agent dispatches, and triggers [CAST-DEBUG] on Bash non-zero exits
CAST cost tracking — records token usage per tool call into cast.db sessions and agent_runs tables
CAST budget guard — injects [CAST-BUDGET-WARN] or [CAST-BUDGET-HARD-LIMIT] when daily spend threshold reached

hooks.prompt: Before finishing: (1) Were code changes made without dispatching code-reviewer? (2) Were commits made without the commit agent? (3) Are there unpushed commits? Check with: git log @{u}..HEAD --oneline 2>/dev/null. If yes to any, dispatch the appropriate agent (code-reviewer, commit, or push) now.

Stop.description: CAST safety net — catches missed reviews/commits before session ends; auto-dispatches chain-reporter after multi-batch orchestrator sessions
